approved_command_preview: Run final Gemini generated-prime release build validation on latest main after chunk checksum update; write build outputs to artifact readback only.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$repo = $env:DCOIR_REPO_ROOT
$out = Join-Path $env:DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR 'gemini_generated_prime_final_validate_001'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null
python (Join-Path $repo 'project_sources/gemini/tools/build_dcoir_gemini_release.py') --source-root (Join-Path $repo 'project_sources/gemini/bundle_source') --output-dir $out
$reportPath = Join-Path $out 'build_dcoir_gemini_release_report.json'
if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $reportPath -PathType Leaf)) { throw 'Missing Gemini build report.' }
$report = Get-Content -LiteralPath $reportPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
if (-not $report.success) { throw 'Gemini generated-prime final validation failed.' }
Write-Host 'Gemini generated-prime final validation passed.'
